entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop being studied in the world germplasm collection

entities.name: WORLD GERMPLASM COLLECTION
entities.description: A collection of 21,772 accessions of pearl millet from 44 countries

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTRE
entities.description: The facility in Patancheru, India, where the germplasm collection is maintained

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The town in India where the ICRISAT Centre is located

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the ICRISAT Centre is located

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet accessions to resist various diseases

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease for which 1220 pearl millet accessions show resistance

entities.name: ERGOT
entities.description: A disease for which 151 pearl millet accessions show resistance

entities.name: SMUT
entities.description: A disease for which 161 pearl millet accessions show resistance

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A disease for which 392 pearl millet accessions show resistance

entities.name: DWARFISM
entities.description: A trait identified in 145 genetic stocks of pearl millet

entities.name: MIDRIBLESS
entities.description: A trait identified in 3 genetic stocks of pearl millet

entities.name: GLOSSY
entities.description: A trait identified in 8 genetic stocks of pearl millet

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A trait found in viable mutants of pearl millet

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A trait identified in lines from Ghana and Botswana

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: A country providing germplasm for male sterile lines

entities.name: BOTSWANA
entities.description: A country providing germplasm for male sterile lines

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: A trait associated with male sterile lines and early-flowering stocks

entities.name: LARGE GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: A trait associated with male sterile lines and germplasm from West Africa

entities.name: SWEET STALK
entities.description: A type of pearl millet characterized by high sugar content

entities.name: HIGH SUGAR CONTENT
entities.description: The attribute of sweet stalk pearl millet types

entities.name: FODDER
entities.description: Livestock feed developed from sweet stalk pearl millet types

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: A trait used to develop early-maturing high-yielding cultivars

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: A trait developed from early-flowering stocks

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region that is a source for disease resistance, high head volume, and large grain size

entities.name: HIGH HEAD VOLUME
entities.description: A trait found in germplasm from West Africa
